name: Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1-2 cloves of garlic, crushed or minced
Italian herbs (such as oregano and basil), a dash each
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushroom caps and remove any stems.
2. Chop the mushroom stems and add equal amounts of shredded carrots and finely chopped onions.
3. Add 1-2 minced garlic cloves, bread cubes, salt, pepper, and Italian herbs to the mixture.
4. Combine all ingredients in a nonstick frying pan and cook until reduced and browned.
5. Optional: Stir in a handful of low-fat or nondairy cheese and allow it to melt slightly.
6. Fill the mushroom caps with the stuffing mixture and sprinkle with paprika.
7. Broil for a few minutes until the tops are browned, the caps soften, and they begin to release moisture.
8. Serve hot with asparagus spears and sectioned oranges.
